gaps.rationale: Only AV Social Sentiment feeds NLP today; no RavenPack / Bloomberg / FinGPT-style transformer pipeline. NLP sentiment via Vertex is embeddings-only, not a dedicated news sentiment model.
gaps.recommended_next_step: add: build phase-6 News & Sentiment Cron (proposal already on masterplan)

gaps.rationale: No time-series foundation models in use. FinGPT / TimesFM / Moirai / Chronos-2 all landed 2024-2026 and show zero-shot forecasting superior to classical ARIMA/GBM on many horizons. Phase-8 proposal on masterplan is the right home.
gaps.recommended_next_step: add: phase-8 Transformer Signals -- pilot Moirai or Chronos-2 in backtest

gaps.rationale: sec_edgar covers Form 4 insider trades only. No 13F/13D (hedge-fund holdings), no QuiverQuant congressional trades, no WhaleWisdom-style aggregation. Missing ~80% of the institutional-filing alpha surface.
gaps.recommended_next_step: add: expand sec_edgar tool to pull 13F + 13D; evaluate QuiverQuant free tier

gaps.rationale: options_flow gives open-interest + IV skew via yfinance; no FINRA short-interest, no unusual-options-activity detection, no put/call imbalance signal.
gaps.recommended_next_step: add: FINRA short-interest bi-weekly ingest + unusual-options detector on existing options_flow data

gaps.rationale: Zero coverage. WSB + Stocktwits are published free signal sources; X firehose is paid (deprioritise). Missing the 2021-style retail-squeeze signal entirely.
gaps.recommended_next_step: add: phase-7 PRAW Reddit scraper + Stocktwits public RSS ingest

gaps.rationale: No coverage. Second Measure / Earnest Analytics are expensive ($10k+/yr). Cheap proxy: company-filed 10-Q revenue deltas already in sec_edgar + yfinance -- not real-time but defensible.
gaps.recommended_next_step: defer paid; add: build a 10-Q revenue-surprise signal from existing sec_edgar data

gaps.rationale: google_trends via pytrends (archived) + 24h cache covers it; follow-up: add Wikipedia pageviews as second signal for ensemble robustness (Wikipedia has no 429 / ToS risk).
gaps.recommended_next_step: keep: google_trends; add Wikipedia pageviews as backup (free; zero auth)

gaps.rationale: FRED covers macro time series well, but we do not ingest the NY Fed / Atlanta Fed GDPNow nowcasts (higher signal density during regime transitions).
gaps.recommended_next_step: add: NY Fed nowcast + Atlanta Fed GDPNow weekly ingest (public URLs, free)

gaps.rationale: No coverage. Orbital Insight / SpaceKnow are paid + pricey; ROI questionable at our capital scale. Defer until multi-million AUM.
gaps.recommended_next_step: skip: revisit when live AUM crosses the paid-tier cost-justification threshold

gaps.rationale: Just replaced PatentsView with BQ public dataset; covers full US grants; free; low-latency enough for the signal.
gaps.recommended_next_step: keep: current BQ public dataset implementation
